description: Phase 0+1+2.7 V6 implementation committed to feat/gl-fusion-v6 (ad329f6)

purpose: Canary run 1 dispatch (bu0e0pntb); blocked by workspace spend limit

findings: silent weight-load failure under Gemma4ForCausalLM (all keys UNEXPECTED)
HTC Float x BFloat16 dtype mismatch

fixes: narrow fp32_boundary to manifold-only, keep Linear in module dtype

findings: multi-head attention assumed each head owned its own Lorentz time component

fixes: v_unit separated from clamped sc_vn in lorentz_expmap0
per-head space split with tiled shared time in HyperbolicAttention

findings: invariant probe 2.86e10 drift in bf16 (precision cliff)
plain dict return has no .logits attr for GenerationMixin

fixes: invariant probe runs in fp32 end-to-end
GLFusionOutput ModelOutput subclass with dual dict/attr access

findings: set_experts_implementation AttributeError (MoE attr on outer model)

result: wrapper produced 'testPanorama' repetition, base model probe produced '額額額...'
conclusion: base model itself generates gibberish; not a wrapper bug

result: embed_tokens std=0.0153 healthy; layer 30 q_proj std=0.01679 healthy; tie_weights() worked; still generates 額額額...
conclusion: weight loading is correct; bug is elsewhere

instruction: stop chain-fixing; run vanilla pipeline sanity check first; use token-level diversity detector not char-level; write hypothesis before each dispatch

findings: top-1 for 'capital of France is' is ' France' at +19.12 (correct continuation)
model generation_config declares do_sample=True, top_p=0.95, top_k=64
with do_sample=False: ' France is France is France is...' (50% ' France'), ' la la la la...' (100% ' la'), '(n):(n):(n):...' (48% 'n') — argmax loops
ROOT CAUSE: greedy decoding traps on low-entropy logit distributions; model needs sampling

evidence: vanilla AutoModelForCausalLM produces same gibberish with no V6 code involved; sampling (top_p=0.95, top_k=64) produces coherent text; Gemma 4 31B-IT's native config is do_sample=True
fix: Two-line change to verify_gl_fusion_v6.py: do_sample=True + top_p=0.95 + top_k=64 + torch.manual_seed(42) in generate_path_check and gate_zero_invariance_check

claim: Gemma 4 31B-IT transformers.generate requires do_sample=True + top_p=0.95 + top_k=64 to avoid argmax loops; greedy decoding produces degenerate single-token repetition regardless of wrapper or loader code

Canary decode checks on LLM wrappers must use token-level coherence (len(set(ids))/len(ids) >= 0.3 and bigram_ratio >= 0.4), not char-level repetition heuristics; CJK collapse produces 16-char strings that char thresholds miss

HF from_pretrained auto-prefix-stripper does not bridge the multimodal model.language_model.* to text-only model.* gap for Gemma 4; use AutoModelForCausalLM (resolves to Gemma4ForConditionalGeneration, correct load, wrapper bypasses multimodal via direct decoder iteration) OR explicit state-dict remap with tie_weights()

Lorentz hyperboloid ops need fp32 boundaries AND output clamping. bf16 loses precision in -time^2 + ||space||^2 cancellation; fp32 loses the +1 once ||space||^2 exceeds ~10^7. Clamp ||space|| <= 15 at HTC output and run expmap/logmap/centroid/distance in fp32 with cast back to bf16 at the boundary

GenerationMixin-aware wrappers need main_input_name, config, generation_config, @property device, @property dtype, get_input_embeddings (+set/output), prepare_inputs_for_generation, generate, can_generate, ModelOutput subclass return, and __getattr__ delegation to base_model for transformers-side attrs (set_experts_implementation, hf_device_map, _supports_sdpa)

Teacher-forced training (forward with labels) is independent of generate path. Even if wrapper.generate is broken, training still produces correct weights; inference-time generate quality depends only on sampling params the caller supplies. Don't block training on inference-config bugs

purpose: Handoff document for new chat with larger context window
